1.premise: Avoiding someone can imply the same autism judgment as saying it aloud.
Only seeing puppies die can make adult dogs seem impossible.
Racist language can be treated as situationally strategic instead of forbidden.

lines.text: Hi there, folks.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: My name's Angel.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: People in the street approach me, and they call me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: autistic.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I don't think it's very nice.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 90% of the people I meet think I'm autistic.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The other 10% just don't talk to me.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm very scared to be here tonight, but I'm very proud to be Latino.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: How many of you here in the audience?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's fucking Texas.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Let me hear it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Arriba!
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah, gracias.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I grew up for the longest time not knowing dogs got bigger than puppies.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I thought all dogs naturally died of parvo.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I just didn't know.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I grew up with the Latino stepdad and he was great until, you know, occasionally we just
lines.label: setup

lines.text: dropped the N-bomb at Walmart, like out of nowhere.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "What's going on my aunt?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "You can't be saying that
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "in this Walmart specifically.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Where'd you fucking learn that word, dad?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He goes, "At work, well you shouldn't be using it.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Unless we're at Home Depot
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: "when we got people behind our back.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "We got the WebBacks helping us out
lines.label: tag

lines.text: "in case of a race riot, right?"
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Oh God.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm bad at dating guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Thank God, let's fucking get this over with.
lines.label: fluff
